revision.comment: For use in portals which display randomly selected "Did You Know?" entries
revision.text:
local p = {}
-- Transclude randomly selected "Did you know?" entries function p.main(frame) -- args = { 1,2,... = page names, paragraphs = list e.g. "1,3-5", files = list, more = text} local args = {} -- args[k] = frame.args[k] or frame:getParent().args[k] for all k in either (numeric or not) for k, v in pairs(frame:getParent().args) do args[k] = v end for k, v in pairs(frame.args) do args[k] = v end -- args from a Lua call have priority over parent args from template
-- Read the input page local page = args[1] or error("No page name given") local title = mw.title.new(page) or error("Missing input page " .. page) local text = title:getContent() or error("No content for page " .. page)
-- Limit to the DYK section if present local sectionstart = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==''Did you know?'' articles==", 1, true) if sectionstart then local sectionend = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==", sectionstart + 1, true) or -1 text = mw.ustring.sub(text, sectionstart, sectionend) end
-- Parse the entries entries = {} for entry in mw.ustring.gmatch(text, "\n%*[.…%s]*([^\n]+)") do if not mw.ustring.find(entry, "article's talk page missing blurb", 1, true) then table.insert(entries, entry) end end
-- Swap some random entries into the first n positions local n = math.min(#entries, args.count or 10) -- the number of entries to produce math.randomseed(os.time()) for i = 1, n do j = math.random(i, #entries) entries[i], entries[j] = "*... " .. entries[j], entries[i] end
-- Return the first n entries text = table.concat(entries, "\n", 1, n) return frame:preprocess(text) end
return p

local p = {}
-- Transclude randomly selected "Did you know?" entries function p.main(frame) -- args = { 1,2,... = page names, paragraphs = list e.g. "1,3-5", files = list, more = text} local args = {} -- args[k] = frame.args[k] or frame:getParent().args[k] for all k in either (numeric or not) for k, v in pairs(frame:getParent().args) do args[k] = v end for k, v in pairs(frame.args) do args[k] = v end -- args from a Lua call have priority over parent args from template
-- Read the input page local page = args[1] or error("No page name given") local title = mw.title.new(page) or error("Missing input page " .. page) local text = title:getContent() or error("No content for page " .. page)
-- Limit to the DYK section if present local sectionstart = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==''Did you know?'' articles==", 1, true) if sectionstart then local sectionend = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==", sectionstart + 1, true) or -1 text = mw.ustring.sub(text, sectionstart, sectionend) end
-- Parse the entries entries = {} for entry in mw.ustring.gmatch(text, "\n%*[.…%s]*([^\n]+)") do if not mw.ustring.find(entry, "article's talk page missing blurb", 1, true) then table.insert(entries, entry) end end
-- Swap some random entries into the first n positions local n = math.min(#entries, args.count or 10) -- the number of entries to produce math.randomseed(os.time()) for i = 1, n do j = math.random(i, #entries) entries[i], entries[j] = "*... " .. entries[j], entries[i] end
-- Return the first n entries text = table.concat(entries, "\n", 1, n) return frame:preprocess(text) end
return p

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
local p = {}
-- Transclude randomly selected "Did you know?" entries function p.main(frame) -- args = { 1,2,... = page names, paragraphs = list e.g. "1,3-5", files = list, more = text} local args = {} -- args[k] = frame.args[k] or frame:getParent().args[k] for all k in either (numeric or not) for k, v in pairs(frame:getParent().args) do args[k] = v end for k, v in pairs(frame.args) do args[k] = v end -- args from a Lua call have priority over parent args from template
-- Read the input page local page = args[1] or error("No page name given") local title = mw.title.new(page) or error("Missing input page " .. page) local text = title:getContent() or error("No content for page " .. page)
-- Limit to the DYK section if present local sectionstart = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==''Did you know?'' articles==", 1, true) if sectionstart then local sectionend = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==", sectionstart + 1, true) or -1 text = mw.ustring.sub(text, sectionstart, sectionend) end
-- Parse the entries entries = {} for entry in mw.ustring.gmatch(text, "\n%*[.…%s]*([^\n]+)") do if not mw.ustring.find(entry, "article's talk page missing blurb", 1, true) then table.insert(entries, entry) end end
-- Swap some random entries into the first n positions local n = math.min(#entries, args.count or 10) -- the number of entries to produce math.randomseed(os.time()) for i = 1, n do j = math.random(i, #entries) entries[i], entries[j] = "*... " .. entries[j], entries[i] end
-- Return the first n entries text = table.concat(entries, "\n", 1, n) return frame:preprocess(text) end
return p
[[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
local p = {}
-- Transclude randomly selected "Did you know?" entries function p.main(frame) -- args = { 1,2,... = page names, paragraphs = list e.g. "1,3-5", files = list, more = text} local args = {} -- args[k] = frame.args[k] or frame:getParent().args[k] for all k in either (numeric or not) for k, v in pairs(frame:getParent().args) do args[k] = v end for k, v in pairs(frame.args) do args[k] = v end -- args from a Lua call have priority over parent args from template
-- Read the input page local page = args[1] or error("No page name given") local title = mw.title.new(page) or error("Missing input page " .. page) local text = title:getContent() or error("No content for page " .. page)
-- Limit to the DYK section if present local sectionstart = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==''Did you know?'' articles==", 1, true) if sectionstart then local sectionend = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==", sectionstart + 1, true) or -1 text = mw.ustring.sub(text, sectionstart, sectionend) end
-- Parse the entries entries = {} for entry in mw.ustring.gmatch(text, "\n%*[.…%s]*([^\n]+)") do if not mw.ustring.find(entry, "article's talk page missing blurb", 1, true) then table.insert(entries, entry) end end
-- Swap some random entries into the first n positions local n = math.min(#entries, args.count or 10) -- the number of entries to produce math.randomseed(os.time()) for i = 1, n do j = math.random(i, #entries) entries[i], entries[j] = "*... " .. entries[j], entries[i] end
-- Return the first n entries text = table.concat(entries, "\n", 1, n) return frame:preprocess(text) end
return p
[[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
local p = {}
-- Transclude randomly selected "Did you know?" entries function p.main(frame) -- args = { 1,2,... = page names, paragraphs = list e.g. "1,3-5", files = list, more = text} local args = {} -- args[k] = frame.args[k] or frame:getParent().args[k] for all k in either (numeric or not) for k, v in pairs(frame:getParent().args) do args[k] = v end for k, v in pairs(frame.args) do args[k] = v end -- args from a Lua call have priority over parent args from template
-- Read the input page local page = args[1] or error("No page name given") local title = mw.title.new(page) or error("Missing input page " .. page) local text = title:getContent() or error("No content for page " .. page)
-- Limit to the DYK section if present local sectionstart = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==''Did you know?'' articles==", 1, true) if sectionstart then local sectionend = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==", sectionstart + 1, true) or -1 text = mw.ustring.sub(text, sectionstart, sectionend) end
-- Parse the entries entries = {} for entry in mw.ustring.gmatch(text, "\n%*[.…%s]*([^\n]+)") do if not mw.ustring.find(entry, "article's talk page missing blurb", 1, true) then table.insert(entries, entry) end end
-- Swap some random entries into the first n positions local n = math.min(#entries, args.count or 10) -- the number of entries to produce math.randomseed(os.time()) for i = 1, n do j = math.random(i, #entries) entries[i], entries[j] = "*... " .. entries[j], entries[i] end
-- Return the first n entries text = table.concat(entries, "\n", 1, n) return frame:preprocess(text) end
return p
[[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]

local p = {}
-- Transclude randomly selected "Did you know?" entries function p.main(frame) -- args = { 1,2,... = page names, paragraphs = list e.g. "1,3-5", files = list, more = text} local args = {} -- args[k] = frame.args[k] or frame:getParent().args[k] for all k in either (numeric or not) for k, v in pairs(frame:getParent().args) do args[k] = v end for k, v in pairs(frame.args) do args[k] = v end -- args from a Lua call have priority over parent args from template
-- Read the input page local page = args[1] or error("No page name given") local title = mw.title.new(page) or error("Missing input page " .. page) local text = title:getContent() or error("No content for page " .. page)
-- Limit to the DYK section if present local sectionstart = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==''Did you know?'' articles==", 1, true) if sectionstart then local sectionend = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==", sectionstart + 1, true) or -1 text = mw.ustring.sub(text, sectionstart, sectionend) end
-- Parse the entries entries = {} for entry in mw.ustring.gmatch(text, "\n%*[.…%s]*([^\n]+)") do if not mw.ustring.find(entry, "article's talk page missing blurb", 1, true) then table.insert(entries, entry) end end
-- Swap some random entries into the first n positions local n = math.min(#entries, args.count or 10) -- the number of entries to produce math.randomseed(os.time()) for i = 1, n do j = math.random(i, #entries) entries[i], entries[j] = "*... " .. entries[j], entries[i] end
-- Return the first n entries text = table.concat(entries, "\n", 1, n) return frame:preprocess(text) end
return p
[[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]

local p = {}
-- Transclude randomly selected "Did you know?" entries function p.main(frame) -- args = { 1,2,... = page names, paragraphs = list e.g. "1,3-5", files = list, more = text} local args = {} -- args[k] = frame.args[k] or frame:getParent().args[k] for all k in either (numeric or not) for k, v in pairs(frame:getParent().args) do args[k] = v end for k, v in pairs(frame.args) do args[k] = v end -- args from a Lua call have priority over parent args from template
-- Read the input page local page = args[1] or error("No page name given") local title = mw.title.new(page) or error("Missing input page " .. page) local text = title:getContent() or error("No content for page " .. page)
-- Limit to the DYK section if present local sectionstart = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==''Did you know?'' articles==", 1, true) if sectionstart then local sectionend = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==", sectionstart + 1, true) or -1 text = mw.ustring.sub(text, sectionstart, sectionend) end
-- Parse the entries entries = {} for entry in mw.ustring.gmatch(text, "\n%*[.…%s]*([^\n]+)") do if not mw.ustring.find(entry, "article's talk page missing blurb", 1, true) then table.insert(entries, entry) end end
-- Swap some random entries into the first n positions local n = math.min(#entries, args.count or 10) -- the number of entries to produce math.randomseed(os.time()) for i = 1, n do j = math.random(i, #entries) entries[i], entries[j] = "*... " .. entries[j], entries[i] end
-- Return the first n entries text = table.concat(entries, "\n", 1, n) return frame:preprocess(text) end
return p
[[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024" to "qq"
revision.text:
local p = {}
-- Transclude randomly selected "Did you know?" entries function p.main(frame) -- args = { 1,2,... = page names, paragraphs = list e.g. "1,3-5", files = list, more = text} local args = {} -- args[k] = frame.args[k] or frame:getParent().args[k] for all k in either (numeric or not) for k, v in pairs(frame:getParent().args) do args[k] = v end for k, v in pairs(frame.args) do args[k] = v end -- args from a Lua call have priority over parent args from template
-- Read the input page local page = args[1] or error("No page name given") local title = mw.title.new(page) or error("Missing input page " .. page) local text = title:getContent() or error("No content for page " .. page)
-- Limit to the DYK section if present local sectionstart = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==''Did you know?'' articles==", 1, true) if sectionstart then local sectionend = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==", sectionstart + 1, true) or -1 text = mw.ustring.sub(text, sectionstart, sectionend) end
-- Parse the entries entries = {} for entry in mw.ustring.gmatch(text, "\n%*[.…%s]*([^\n]+)") do if not mw.ustring.find(entry, "article's talk page missing blurb", 1, true) then table.insert(entries, entry) end end
-- Swap some random entries into the first n positions local n = math.min(#entries, args.count or 10) -- the number of entries to produce math.randomseed(os.time()) for i = 1, n do j = math.random(i, #entries) entries[i], entries[j] = "*... " .. entries[j], entries[i] end
-- Return the first n entries text = table.concat(entries, "\n", 1, n) return frame:preprocess(text) end
return p
[[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]]

local p = {}
-- Transclude randomly selected "Did you know?" entries function p.main(frame) -- args = { 1,2,... = page names, paragraphs = list e.g. "1,3-5", files = list, more = text} local args = {} -- args[k] = frame.args[k] or frame:getParent().args[k] for all k in either (numeric or not) for k, v in pairs(frame:getParent().args) do args[k] = v end for k, v in pairs(frame.args) do args[k] = v end -- args from a Lua call have priority over parent args from template
-- Read the input page local page = args[1] or error("No page name given") local title = mw.title.new(page) or error("Missing input page " .. page) local text = title:getContent() or error("No content for page " .. page)
-- Limit to the DYK section if present local sectionstart = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==''Did you know?'' articles==", 1, true) if sectionstart then local sectionend = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==", sectionstart + 1, true) or -1 text = mw.ustring.sub(text, sectionstart, sectionend) end
-- Parse the entries entries = {} for entry in mw.ustring.gmatch(text, "\n%*[.…%s]*([^\n]+)") do if not mw.ustring.find(entry, "article's talk page missing blurb", 1, true) then table.insert(entries, entry) end end
-- Swap some random entries into the first n positions local n = math.min(#entries, args.count or 10) -- the number of entries to produce math.randomseed(os.time()) for i = 1, n do j = math.random(i, #entries) entries[i], entries[j] = "*... " .. entries[j], entries[i] end
-- Return the first n entries text = table.concat(entries, "\n", 1, n) return frame:preprocess(text) end
return p
[[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]][[en:{{{subst:PAGENAME}}}]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]]

local p = {}
-- Transclude randomly selected "Did you know?" entries function p.main(frame) -- args = { 1,2,... = page names, paragraphs = list e.g. "1,3-5", files = list, more = text} local args = {} -- args[k] = frame.args[k] or frame:getParent().args[k] for all k in either (numeric or not) for k, v in pairs(frame:getParent().args) do args[k] = v end for k, v in pairs(frame.args) do args[k] = v end -- args from a Lua call have priority over parent args from template
-- Read the input page local page = args[1] or error("No page name given") local title = mw.title.new(page) or error("Missing input page " .. page) local text = title:getContent() or error("No content for page " .. page)
-- Limit to the DYK section if present local sectionstart = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==''Did you know?'' articles==", 1, true) if sectionstart then local sectionend = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==", sectionstart + 1, true) or -1 text = mw.ustring.sub(text, sectionstart, sectionend) end
-- Parse the entries entries = {} for entry in mw.ustring.gmatch(text, "\n%*[.…%s]*([^\n]+)") do if not mw.ustring.find(entry, "article's talk page missing blurb", 1, true) then table.insert(entries, entry) end end
-- Swap some random entries into the first n positions local n = math.min(#entries, args.count or 10) -- the number of entries to produce math.randomseed(os.time()) for i = 1, n do j = math.random(i, #entries) entries[i], entries[j] = "*... " .. entries[j], entries[i] end
-- Return the first n entries text = table.concat(entries, "\n", 1, n) return frame:preprocess(text) end
return p
[[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]][[en:{{{subst:PAGENAME}}}]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:subst:PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{{subst:PAGENAME}}}" to "{{subst:PAGENAME}}"
revision.text:
local p = {}
-- Transclude randomly selected "Did you know?" entries function p.main(frame) -- args = { 1,2,... = page names, paragraphs = list e.g. "1,3-5", files = list, more = text} local args = {} -- args[k] = frame.args[k] or frame:getParent().args[k] for all k in either (numeric or not) for k, v in pairs(frame:getParent().args) do args[k] = v end for k, v in pairs(frame.args) do args[k] = v end -- args from a Lua call have priority over parent args from template
-- Read the input page local page = args[1] or error("No page name given") local title = mw.title.new(page) or error("Missing input page " .. page) local text = title:getContent() or error("No content for page " .. page)
-- Limit to the DYK section if present local sectionstart = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==''Did you know?'' articles==", 1, true) if sectionstart then local sectionend = mw.ustring.find(text, "\n==", sectionstart + 1, true) or -1 text = mw.ustring.sub(text, sectionstart, sectionend) end
-- Parse the entries entries = {} for entry in mw.ustring.gmatch(text, "\n%*[.…%s]*([^\n]+)") do if not mw.ustring.find(entry, "article's talk page missing blurb", 1, true) then table.insert(entries, entry) end end
-- Swap some random entries into the first n positions local n = math.min(#entries, args.count or 10) -- the number of entries to produce math.randomseed(os.time()) for i = 1, n do j = math.random(i, #entries) entries[i], entries[j] = "*... " .. entries[j], entries[i] end
-- Return the first n entries text = table.concat(entries, "\n", 1, n) return frame:preprocess(text) end
return p
[[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:subst:PAGENAME}}]]
